name: Password Generator
input:
The first line contains a single integer $t$ ($1 \le t \le 1000$) — the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of one line containing three integers $a$, $b$, and $c$ ($1 \le a, b, c \le 10$).
output: For each test case, output one line containing any suitable password. It can be shown that there is always at least one password that meets the requirements.
